core_issue: User receives a 403 error when attempting to log in to arcvault.io/user/jsmith after the update deployed last Tuesday.
human_summary: Customer reports they cannot log in and receive a 403 error when accessing arcvault.io/user/jsmith. Issue began after the update rolled out last Tuesday; customer needs access restored or guidance on resolving the permission/authorization error. Critical details: affected account 'jsmith' and error code 403.

core_issue: Customer requests a bulk export feature for audit logs to save time on compliance-related work.
human_summary: Customer is requesting a bulk export capability for audit logs to support their compliance workflows. They describe themselves as a compliance-heavy organization and say this feature would save them hours each month, so please evaluate feasibility and prioritization for adding an export option for audit logs.

core_issue: Customer reports invoice #8821 shows a charge of $1,240 while their contract rate is $980/month and requests an investigation.
human_summary: The customer says invoice #8821 billed $1,240, but their contracted rate is $980/month and asks us to look into the discrepancy. Please verify the invoice details, billing rate applied, and adjust or refund if an overcharge occurred. Key details: invoice number 8821 and the two amounts ($1,240 vs $980/month).

core_issue: Customer is asking whether ArcVault supports SSO integration with Okta and requests guidance on how to configure it as they evaluate switching their auth provider.
human_summary: The customer wants to know if ArcVault can be set up with Okta SSO and is evaluating a switch of their authentication provider. Please provide documentation or step-by-step guidance for Okta SSO setup, compatibility notes, and any prerequisites or contact for configuration support.

core_issue: The customer's dashboard stopped loading around 2pm EST and multiple users are affected.
escalation_reason: Category is Incident/Outage — requires immediate human review
human_summary: The customer's dashboard stopped loading around 2pm EST and multiple users are affected; they report the issue is on our side. They require immediate investigation and restoration of dashboard access; no account ID or error code was provided in the message.
